landing.lede: Real-machine, real-browser web performance measurement with ~99% cross-origin iframe coverage. Runs on your hardware, not a synthetic datacenter CPU.

realNumbers.title: Real numbers from real browsers
realNumbers.body: Chromium runs on your machine; no synthetic CPU throttle by default.

iframeCoverage.title: Cross-origin iframe deep-inspection
iframeCoverage.body: CDP Target.setAutoAttach delivers ~99% measurable signals across OOPIFs.

pluginFirst.title: Plugin-first
pluginFirst.body: Every metric, audit, reporter is a plugin: web-vitals, axe-core, custom metrics.

honestVariance.title: Honest variance
honestVariance.body: Every report carries CoV. Unstable runs (CoV>20%) get a visible banner.

ciStable.title: CI-Stable mode
ciStable.body: Pre-flight CPU calibration so numbers compare across runners.

inertShares.title: Inert shared reports
inertShares.body: Public viewers never re-execute plugin code.

extension.title: Chrome extension
extension.body: Install the extension, click the toolbar icon on any tab to measure it.
